steps.title: Find the central claim
steps.content: The first sentence introduces one Highwaymen painting as typical of the group's work. The second sentence gives the broader point: art historians suggest Highwaymen paintings helped shape popular images of Florida, especially tropical forests and vivid sunsets.

steps.title: Reject narrow purposes
steps.content: Choice A overfocuses on Al Black's single painting. Choice C invents a resurgence in popularity. Choice D invents a comparison between past and recent public reactions. The purpose is to present the claim that the group's paintings helped create a lasting impression of Florida. The answer is B.
